'''dhagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qinpu|qinpu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qinpu|qinpu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhagaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægækæth|dhægækæth]] || [[word:dhægækæj|dhægækæj]] || [[word:dhægækæsh|dhægækæsh]] || [[word:dhægækæ|dhægækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagagakath|dhagagakath]] || [[word:dhagagakaj|dhagagakaj]] || [[word:dhagagakash|dhagagakash]] || [[word:dhagagaka|dhagagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagakath|dhagakath]] || [[word:dhagakaj|dhagakaj]] || [[word:dhagakash|dhagakash]] || [[word:dhagaka|dhagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagafkath|dhagafkath]] || [[word:dhagafkaj|dhagafkaj]] || [[word:dhagafkash|dhagafkash]] || [[word:dhagafkaf|dhagafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhagakatha|dhagakatha]] || [[word:dhagakaja|dhagakaja]] || [[word:dhagakasha|dhagakasha]] || [[word:dhagakaka|dhagakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhagakath|dhagakath]] || [[word:dhagakaj|dhagakaj]] || [[word:dhagakash|dhagakash]] || [[word:dhagaka|dhagaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhagakathal|dhagakathal]] || [[word:dhagakajal|dhagakajal]] || [[word:dhagakashal|dhagakashal]] || [[word:dhagakakal|dhagakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhagakathatha|dhagakathatha]] || [[word:dhagakajaja|dhagakajaja]] || [[word:dhagakashasha|dhagakashasha]] || [[word:dhagakaka|dhagakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhagakathan|dhagakathan]] || [[word:dhagakajan|dhagakajan]] || [[word:dhagakashan|dhagakashan]] || [[word:dhagakakan|dhagakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhagakathaoro|dhagakathaoro]] || [[word:dhagakajaoro|dhagakajaoro]] || [[word:dhagakashaoro|dhagakashaoro]] || [[word:dhagakakaoro|dhagakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
